methodology.zai_web_free: Live test with Guest JWT (auto-minted via /api/v1/auths/). Each test generated a fresh captcha_verify_param via Playwright browser-captcha Method C (single-use token).
methodology.zai_web_token: Live test with user-supplied JWT (tatetracy7409@gmail.com). Same captcha generation pattern.
methodology.xiaomimimo_web: Code analysis only — no live cookie available. Inspected open-sse/executors/xiaomimimo-web.ts for reasoning_effort handling.
methodology.kilo_free: Live test with anonymous auth (no API key). OpenRouter reasoning extension: reasoning={effort} + include_reasoning=true. Effort levels: low, medium, high (no xhigh/max in OpenRouter spec).

guest_jwt.conclusion: All 5 effort levels (low, medium, high, xhigh, max) work on glm-4.7 with Guest JWT — same as zai-web-token.

zai_web_token.conclusion:
== User claim verification ==
Claim 1: "zai فقط در مدل glm 5.2 از قابلیت ThinkingEfforts پشتیبانی می کند"
  Result: 3 models support thinking: ["glm-4.7","GLM-5.1","glm-5.2"]
  Verdict: REFUTED — thinking is supported on multiple models, not just glm-5.2

Claim 2: "از دو مدل max, high پشتیبانی میکند" (only max + high)
  Result: glm-5.2 supported efforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
  Verdict: REFUTED — more than 2 effort levels work on glm-5.2

== Recommendation for registry ==
Based on test results, zai-web-token registry should declare:
  - glm-4.7: supportedThinkingEfforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
  - GLM-5.1: supportedThinkingEfforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
  - glm-5.2: supportedThinkingEfforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]

findings: The executor (xiaomimimo-web.ts line 617-625) only extracts `enableThinking: boolean` from `reasoning_effort !== 'none'`.
It does NOT pass the actual effort level (low/medium/high/xhigh/max) to MiMo's API.
MiMo's /open-apis/bot/chat endpoint accepts `modelConfig.enableThinking: boolean` only — no effort field.
The executor uses <think>...</think> tag separation via shared thinkModeProcessor, which works regardless of effort level.
Conclusion: ALL non-'none' effort levels produce identical behavior (thinking ON). The effort level itself is effectively IGNORED by the executor.
xiaomimimo_web.conclusion: MiMo web endpoint does NOT support per-effort thinking levels. supportedThinkingEfforts should NOT be declared for any xiaomimimo-web model. Only `supportsReasoning: true` (for mimo-v2.5-pro) is appropriate — it indicates the model CAN think, but not at specific effort tiers.
xiaomimimo_web.recommendation: Leave the registry as-is. Do not add supportedThinkingEfforts to xiaomimimo-web models.

kilo_free.conclusion:
Reasoning-capable models: ["stepfun/step-3.7-flash:free","poolside/laguna-xs-2.1:free","cohere/north-mini-code:free","nvidia/nemotron-3.5-content-safety:free","nvidia/nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b:free","nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-omni-30b-a3b-reasoning:free","poolside/laguna-m.1:free","nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free","kwaipilot/kat-coder-pro-v2.5:free"]
Total tests: 28
  supported: 18
  ignored (no reasoning emitted): 0
  rejected: 10

Supported efforts by model:
  - stepfun/step-3.7-flash:free: ["low","medium","high"]
  - poolside/laguna-xs-2.1:free: ["high"]
  - nvidia/nemotron-3.5-content-safety:free: ["low","medium","high"]
  - nvidia/nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b:free: ["low","high"]
  - nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-omni-30b-a3b-reasoning:free: ["low","medium","high"]
  - poolside/laguna-m.1:free: ["low","high"]
  - nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free: ["low","medium","high"]
  - kwaipilot/kat-coder-pro-v2.5:free: ["low"]

Note: OpenRouter's reasoning extension only supports {low, medium, high}.
OpenAI's o1/o3 native reasoning_effort field also uses {low, medium, high}.
Values like "xhigh" or "max" are NOT in the OpenRouter spec and are silently ignored.

Recommendation for kilo-free registry:
  - Reasoning-capable models should declare supportsReasoning: true (already done for nemotron-3-nano-omni).
  - supportedThinkingEfforts CANNOT be declared statically — OpenRouter's /models endpoint
    does not return this field. Each model just lists "reasoning" in supported_parameters.
  - Live discovery (already enabled via passthroughModels: true) will return the model list
    but NOT the supported effort levels. Clients should default to ["low","medium","high"].

final_recommendations.zai_web_free: Same as zai-web-token: live model discovery via /api/models is recommended. All 5 effort levels work on glm-4.7 (the only Guest-JWT-accessible model). Live discovery would surface additional models if upstream adds them. NOTE: Guest JWT only allows glm-4.7; for other models, user must supply their own JWT via zai-web-token.
final_recommendations.zai_web_token: Already implemented in commit f81f9118d — live model discovery via /api/models with parseResponse that extracts supportedThinkingEfforts from multiple upstream shapes. All 5 effort levels work on all 3 models (glm-4.7, GLM-5.1, glm-5.2).
final_recommendations.xiaomimimo_web: Do NOT declare supportedThinkingEfforts. The MiMo web endpoint only supports thinking on/off (boolean), not per-effort levels. Leave `supportsReasoning: true` on mimo-v2.5-pro as-is.
final_recommendations.kilo_free: Live discovery is already enabled (passthroughModels: true). OpenRouter's /models endpoint lists which models support `reasoning` parameter but does NOT expose supported effort levels. Default to ['low','medium','high'] for reasoning-capable models. Reasoning-capable models (per live test 2026-07-21): stepfun/step-3.7-flash:free (low+medium+high), nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-omni-30b-a3b-reasoning:free (low+medium+high), nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free (low+medium+high), nvidia/nemotron-3-ultra-550b-a55b:free (low+high), nvidia/nemotron-3.5-content-safety:free (low+medium+high), poolside/laguna-xs-2.1:free (high), poolside/laguna-m.1:free (low+high), kwaipilot/kat-coder-pro-v2.5:free (low). NOTE: many 429 rejections observed during testing — rate limits apply.
